Welcome to Internal Flip Sales Overview. So these are the sales that you're making to existing customers to get them to either stop being a large of your customers and becoming remote or HCP customers, or going from a simple EFT customer, that's a group training customer to that, and an online client. So either we are swapping or we're adding to to their memberships. So let's get rock and roll. So each of the overview, each of the scripts that I'm gonna go over will require this as kind of like the front end of every sale, because it's still a sale and you need to approach it that way. Okay, so when these EFT users, just in customers coming in the door, you still like, you can't forget your sales fundamentals. So you still need to clarify whether they're a little problem over the past pain, and I'll go through that. And so the first three steps of every sale the same, it's just that when we get into the sale, the actual pitch of the thing that we're going to use to solve the pain is going to be different based on the offers that we're making. So this will be the first three steps of any of the sales, and then whether you're doing straight remote, or remote or HCP, or bolt on, there are three slightly nuanced differences between those scripts, and I'll cover each of those in their own videos so that you'll know what to do. So first thing, as soon as you have your little small talk to chat, is clarify why they started at your gym. So hey, Susan's so great to have you, you've been such an awesome client. Just let's go back in time. What made you sign up when you came here? Get into that goal, right? And then label them with their original goal and be like, all right, well, have you lost 60 pounds yet? You know, how long has it been since you've been losing weight? And especially if you have had people there for a year, a lot of times they don't lose anything, they lose something in the beginning, but then they like the community, whatever, and that's why they stay, but their original goal, they haven't gotten any closer to it, okay? As with it, and then that is why you can solve it. So no matter what the situation is, if they love it, then you're like, cool, then you should trust me to be able to create something that's even better than this. If I made the thing that you love, this is gonna be better. If on the flip side, they are like, you know what, I kind of, I have been maintaining my weight, I have been pretty much staying the same, or I haven't really hit my goal, then it's like, it's gonna be one of these three problems which all of them are solved by any number of the solutions that we're gonna provide in the next three, all right? So make sure you do this before you get to the other points.
